zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Robinson於1520年出生在英國貝德福爾貝德福德時，她的父親John Robinson35歲，母親Katherine Johnson31歲。她於大約1539年與Thomas Grante結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1593年在英國林可爾史爾享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Robinson于1520年出生在英国貝德福爾貝德福德时，她的父亲John Robinson35岁，母亲Katherine Johnson31岁。她于大约1539年与Thomas Grante结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1593年在英国林可爾史爾享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Robinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): patronymic from the Middle English personal name Robin , a pet form of Robert , + -son. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
French: from a pet form of the personal name   Robin  .

West Indian (including Haiti) and Guyanese: most likely not (only) of English or French origin as in 1 above and 2 above, but also, if not mostly, from the related name of the famous Daniel Defoe's literary character Robinson Crusoe (from a novel first published in 1719).

variants.name: Robbinson
meanings: Altered form of English or French   Robinson  .

variants.name: Robin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Andre, Emile, Marcel, Achille, Armand, Arnaud, Camille, Julien, Michel, Normand.
French, Breton, Scottish, English, and German: from the personal name Robin, a pet form of Robert , composed of the short form Rob + the hypocoristic suffix -in.
Slovenian: topographic name derived from rob ‘edge, border’ (see Robar ).

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Robinson was born in 1520, in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, her father, John Robinson, was 35 and her mother, Katherine Johnson, was 31. She married Thomas Grante about 1539. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1593, in Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Robinson est née en 1520, à Bedford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Robinson, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Katherine Johnson, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Grante environ 1539. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1593, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Robinson 1520 in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Robinson 35 und ihre Mutter Katherine Johnson 31. Sie hat um 1539 Thomas Grante geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1593 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Robinson è nata il nel 1520 nel Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, sua padre, John Robinson, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Katherine Johnson, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Grante circa 1539. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1593, nel Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 73 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Robinson(이)가 1520년 영국 베드퍼드실르 베드퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Robinson(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Johnson(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1539년 Thomas Grante(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1593년 영국 링코실르에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Robinson nasceu em 1520, em Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Robinson, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Johnson, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Grante aproximadamente 1539. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1593, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Robinson родилась в 1520 г. в местности бедфорд, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Robinson было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Johnson, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Grante около 1539 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1593 г. в местности линколншир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Robinson nació en 1520, en Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Robinson, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Katherine Johnson, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Thomas Grante aproximadamente 1539. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1593, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años.
